description: Edit the properties of the existing 'fells_loop' track in Garmin BaseCamp. Rename the track to 'Fells Reservation Survey - Fall 2024', change its display color to 'Red', and update the Notes/Description field to: 'Autumn wildlife corridor survey through Middlesex Fells Reservation. Route follows primary ridge trail for annual raptor census.'

metadata.expected_description: Autumn wildlife corridor survey through Middlesex Fells Reservation. Route follows primary ridge trail for annual raptor census.
